name: cap127-jupyter-validation
postCreateCommand:
set -eux; sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip python3-venv libcap2-bin; sudo python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages jupyterlab; sudo setcap cap_net_bind_service=+ep /usr/bin/python3.12; mkdir -p /home/vscode/.jupyter; cat > /home/vscode/.jupyter/jupyter_lab_config.py <<'PY'
c.ServerApp.ip = '127.0.0.1'
c.ServerApp.port = 127
c.ServerApp.port_retries = 0
c.ServerApp.open_browser = False
c.ServerApp.token = 'DEVCONTAINER_CAP127_MARKER'
PY
getcap /usr/bin/python3.12; cat /home/vscode/.jupyter/jupyter_lab_config.py; echo DEVCONTAINER_CAP127_DONE
